ddls:
CREATE TABLE "squirrel_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each squirrel */,
  "hectare" TEXT /* Code for the specific hectare within the study area */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the observation was made (AM or PM) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "hectare_squirrel_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the squirrel within the hectare */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age category of the squirrel */,
  "primary_fur_color" TEXT /* Primary fur color of the squirrel */,
  "highlight_fur_color" TEXT /* Highlight fur color of the squirrel */,
  "combination_color" TEXT /* Combination of primary and highlight fur colors */,
  "color_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on fur color */,
  "location" TEXT /* General location of the observation */,
  "above_ground_sighter_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the squirrel's position above the ground */,
  "specific_location" INTEGER /* Specific location within the hectare */,
  "running" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel was running */,
  "chasing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel was chasing */,
  "climbing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel was climbing */,
  "eating" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel was eating */,
  "foraging" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel was foraging */,
  "other_activities" TEXT /* Description of other activities */,
  "kuks" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel made kuks */,
  "quaas" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel made quaas */,
  "moans" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel made moans */,
  "tail_flags" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel flagged its tail */,
  "tail_twitches" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel twitched its tail */,
  "approaches" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel approached the observer */,
  "indifferent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel was indifferent to the observer */,
  "runs_from" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the squirrel ran from the observer */,
  "other_interactions" INTEGER /* Description of other interactions */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the observation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the observation */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the observation */,
  "community_district" INTEGER /* Community district of the observation */,
  "borough_boundary" INTEGER /* Borough boundary of the observation */,
  "city_council_district" INTEGER /* City council district of the observation */,
  "police_precinct" INTEGER /* Police precinct of the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the observation */,
  "observation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the observation in minutes */,
  "observer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the observer */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the squirrel (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_observations_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_observations_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES locations ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrels" (
  "squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each squirrel */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age category of the squirrel */,
  "primary_fur_color" TEXT /* Primary fur color of the squirrel */,
  "highlight_fur_color" TEXT /* Highlight fur color of the squirrel */,
  "tag_date" TEXT /* Date when the squirrel was first tagged */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health assessment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the squirrel (if measured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the observation */,
  "community_district" INTEGER /* Community district of the observation */,
  "borough_boundary" INTEGER /* Borough boundary of the observation */,
  "city_council_district" INTEGER /* City council district of the observation */,
  "police_precinct" INTEGER /* Police precinct of the observation */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park or urban area */,
  "landmark" TEXT /* Nearby landmark for easier identification */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, assistant) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was made */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used for the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observation_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES squirrel_observations ("observation_id")
)
